title: pyrrosia nummulariifolia
intro: Pyrrosia nummulariifolia, also known as the Coin-leaved Pyrrosia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, characterized by its small, coin-shaped leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia nummulariifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with herbal preparations also involving the use of the leaves in teas, tinctures, and capsules.
